name: WP-L12-pluralization: migrate manual plurals to the i18n plural model
description: Findings: F-065 + F-071 (29 manual-pluralization sites — doubly broken: hardcoded English words AND a binary singular/plural model that fails languages with more plural forms). Migrate to i18next count-based plural keys. Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 sites on i18next count-based plurals; correct rendering for multi-form locales (pl, cs); no hardcoded plural words remain.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-pluralization)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #5 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-657 / WI-658.
Bundle rationale
29 manual-pluralization sites are doubly broken: hardcoded English words AND a binary singular/plural model that fails languages with more plural categories (Polish, Czech among conversation locales).
Strategy
Migrate every manual-plural site to i18next plural keys (_one/_other and language-specific categories via count). WI-621 group B already converted session-transcript's message/messages branch and NOTED remaining single-key sites in PR #961 — start from that breadcrumb. Inventory with a sweep for ternary/concat plural patterns; verify Polish/Czech (multi-category) render via pnpm translate output spot checks.
Scope
In: F-065, F-071 (the 29-site inventory). Out: non-plural string extraction (WI-621); new copy.
Findings
F-065 — Manual pluralization sites: hardcoded English singular/plural words.
F-071 — Coordinator synthesis: 29 sites, binary model fails multi-category languages.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
All manual-plural sites migrated to i18n-native plural keys; zero ternary/concat plural patterns remain (sweep-verified).
Multi-category locale (pl) keys generated and spot-verified; en.json keys same PR; pnpm translate run.
i18n checkers, typecheck, related tests green.
Risk & blast radius
Low/mechanical — key-shape migration; behavior-preserving for en. Disjoint from WI-623/624 surfaces; safe alongside either.
